name: my-claude-plugins
description: Team plugin marketplace for Claude Code extensions

metadata.description: Curated collection of Claude Code plugins for team use

plugins.name: ripvec
plugins.description: Semantic code + document search + knowledge-graph skill index. Model2Vec static bi-encoder (potion-base-32M) + TinyBERT-L-2 cross-encoder reranker, CPU-only. 21 tree-sitter grammars, 26 extensions, MCP + LSP server. 4.1.15: intent-routing skill description trimmed under Codex's 1024-char loader limit (was 1047, now 900); orientation-grouped triggers preserved. 4.1.14: up_to_date MCP tool rebuilt — release_stale + upgrade_hint via GitHub Releases API. 4.1.13: MCP project-root default honors CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR. 4.1.12: focus-PageRank recalibrated (α 0.15→0.35). 4.1.10: knowledge-graph orchestration layer — 5 orientation hubs, 7 language recipe skills, 7 commands (/orient /cartograph /blast-radius /dead-code /audit /teach /trace). 4.1.0: find_dead_code. 4.0: LSP-shaped composability.

plugins.name: tracemeld
plugins.description: LLM-native performance profiling — import CPU profiles from any language (Rust, Go, Python, TypeScript, C/C++), find bottlenecks, detect waste patterns, and navigate to hot code via LSP. Includes 12 MCP tools, 6 language profiling skills, and a performance analysis agent.
